title: Freelance game technical designer, game designer, and web/app developer.

about.description: Creative Developer based near Milan, specialized in game technical design, game design, and frontend development. With a strong creativity and programming experience.
about.description2: If you are interested in working with me on a project, reach out!

news.text: You can currently play my thesis game project, [Deadly Nightshade](/work/deadly-nightshade). If you like the project, consider checking it out!

hero.title: I build interactive software, playful systems, and digital experiences.
hero.description: From game mechanics to polished web interfaces, I focus on shipping work that feels crafted, responsive, and memorable.

reel.title: Video Reel
reel.description: A quick look at selected interactive work. This placeholder reel will be replaced by the final cut.

testimonials.name: Christian Catenacci
testimonials.quote: Alberto bridges design and engineering naturally. He solves technical constraints without losing the creative intent.

testimonials.name: Giulia Insolera
testimonials.quote: He is reliable under pressure and keeps teams aligned. His systems are practical, readable, and built for iteration.

testimonials.name: Marco Bianchi
testimonials.quote: One of the most technically driven students I've seen. His thesis project showed maturity well beyond his experience level.

testimonials.name: Elena Rossi
testimonials.quote: Working with Alberto felt seamless. He took vague UX ideas and turned them into clean, functional interfaces faster than anyone I've worked with.

testimonials.name: Luca Ferri
testimonials.role: Mobile Developer · Too Poop To Go
testimonials.quote: His frontend work and API integration were solid from day one. Great communicator and even better at shipping quality code on tight timelines.

favoriteQuotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
favoriteQuotes.author: Kent Beck

favoriteQuotes.text: Games are conversations between systems and players.
favoriteQuotes.author: Raph Koster
